Lawful Good.name: Lawful Good
Lawful Good.description: Believes in a just academic order; combines a deep sense of duty with the promotion of institutional welfare.[cite: 7]

Neutral Good.name: Neutral Good
Neutral Good.description: Community-focused; prioritizes uplifting teammates and fostering harmony within the system.[cite: 7]

Chaotic Good.name: Chaotic Good
Chaotic Good.description: Values creative/moral freedom over bureaucracy; frequently breaks rules to protect or assist peers.[cite: 7]

Lawful Neutral.name: Lawful Neutral
Lawful Neutral.description: Operates strictly by the student handbook, tradition, or a personal code, independent of moral pressures.[cite: 7]

True Neutral.name: True Neutral
True Neutral.description: Detached from campus politics and social drama; prefers to observe the multiverse from a distance.[cite: 7]

Chaotic Neutral.name: Chaotic Neutral
Chaotic Neutral.description: Pushes the boundaries of university policy for the sake of personal expression and exploration.[cite: 7]

Lawful Evil.name: Lawful Evil
Lawful Evil.description: Methodically exploits the university hierarchy and rules to ensure their own advancement at any cost.[cite: 7]

Neutral Evil.name: Neutral Evil
Neutral Evil.description: Does whatever they can get away with to succeed, lacking compassion for struggling classmates.[cite: 7]

Chaotic Evil.name: Chaotic Evil
Chaotic Evil.description: Spurred by personal greeds or animosities; acts with arbitrary disregard for campus safety or academic progress.[cite: 7]
